text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The first scene, with a group of people gathered in what appears to be a modern, well-lit space, hints at the beginnings of an event or talk. The air is filled with low chatter, and I find myself wondering about the collective knowledge and stories each person carries. In the adjacent space, the colorful R+D wall and the interactive exhibit speak to humanity's creative urge to research and innovate. I am invigorated by this environment of inquiry, and I feel quietly inspired, as if on the verge of discovering something that will expand my perspective. I am both participant and observer, eager to let these experiences shape the questions I ask about the world.
